address.streetAddress: DPSG School, Site 3, Meerut Rd Industrial Area, Ghukna, Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh 201001, India

itemListElement.reviewBody:
DPSG is degrading its quality day by day. Management is incompetent in running the school. PTM are just for the sake of name, Parents hardly get 2 min to talk. Teachers are just focused on completing the course and no focus on child development.

They were among the best school in Ghaziabad but they are degrading the quality now a days.

itemReviewed.name: DPSG Meerut Road - Meerut Road Industrial Area

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Very very bad school. Just wastage of time of the students life.
Teachers are not answerable for anything.
Even parents can not approach directly to the Principal.
No personal care of the students due to high no of students in the school.
Teachers focus on completion of course rather than focussing on knowledge received by the students.

I suggest go to any of the school but not in DPS Ghaziabad, meerut road.

itemReviewed.name: DPSG Meerut Road - Meerut Road Industrial Area

itemListElement.reviewBody:
DPSG school is good till 6th grade after that students get spoiled.After 10th grade they demand a high percentage to give u stream for pcm they need 85℅ where other schools give pcm only at 70%.and the tution fee is very high. My review is that the school was good till 2016 after that the school dose not care of any facility students don't get seats in buses because they are very small. My son didn't get commerce without maths bcuz he had less grades in maths and when we applied for tc they asked to give Q1 fee. My son was studying in this school since 2013 and the school dosent care that how will the student manage to get new admission. I changed my daughter school from DPS to kdb it's much better than dps.

Best Schooling experience !!

DELHI PUBLIC SCHOOL, MEERUT ROAD, GHAZIABAD - This is the best school I have attended in my life till now. This school consists of all the activities from sports to academics.

We all say, we love our school but it is noticed or felt when you leave that school.

I left this school after passing 10th. The School building is the main thing that attracts every child in this school as it consists of friend-like teachers, Best friends and the aura of this school.

It consists of all the highly maintained labs, air conditioners, heaters, etc.

Every child has his/her favorite school and my favorite and the best ever school is this till now. I can only say this as I am currently in class 12th and I have changed 2 schools after attending DPSG. The kind of students and teachers I got in this school were awesome from all directions.

EVERYONE SHOULD LOVE THEIR GURUS WHO TAUGHT THEM TO STAND IN THEIR LIVES.
